items.title: This ETF Outperformed the S&P 500 3-To-1 Last Year. Here’s Why I Expect a Repeat in 2026
items.description: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSEARCA:SPY) returned 17.72% for all of 2025, dividends included. An ETF called the Procure Space ETF (NASDAQ:UFO) returned 66.36% in the same time period, more than 3 times more than the SPY.
